<!-- Cursor IDE Session 206b057c-8b27-42a4-a1c8-fb4cc5955cb0 (2026-06-11 16:10:25Z) -->

_**User**_

S020
/tech-spec 
Create an append-only stretch addendum to docs/TECH_SPEC.md.

Do not rewrite existing S1–S9 sections.

Do not change PRD.

Do not change implementation code.

Add exactly three new stretch slices:

S10 — Currency and country_code

- Covers PRD R11 and R19.

- Add currency and countryCode to Snapshot.

- Add SQLite/Drizzle migration:

  - currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GBP'

  - country_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GB'

- Existing snapshots receive defaults through migration.

- MVP/stretch uses defaults only: GBP / GB.

- No currency selector.

- No country selector.

- Use currency when formatting money where relevant.

S11 — Secure time-limited statement sharing

- Covers PRD R12 and R19.

- Customer can create a time-limited link for a specific immutable snapshot.

- Generated link uses a random bearer token.

- Store only SHA-256 token hash, never raw token.

- Default expiry: 24 hours.

- Link resolves to a read-only shared statement page.

- Expired and invalid links return the same generic safe message.

- No email/SMS sending.

- No revocation UI.

- No account permission model.

- No token or I&E payload logging.

S12 — PDF export

- Covers PRD R13 and R19.

- Customer can download a PDF statement for an owned snapshot.

- Generate PDF on demand.

- Do not store generated PDF files.

- Use a lightweight server-side PDF generator.

- Include:

  - product title / lightweight branding

  - snapshot date

  - currency / country

  - income total

  - expenditure total

  - disposable income

  - band

  - reasons

  - income and expenditure breakdown

  - support signpost

  - not-financial-advice framing

Also update:

- TECH_SPEC traceability table

- out-of-scope section if needed

- trade-offs section if needed

Constraints:

- Do not implement R11/R12/R13 code yet.

- Do not add auth.

- Do not add email/SMS.

- Do not add Playwright unless there is a clear blocker.

- Do not change existing MVP architecture.

- Keep every stretch small enough for one /implement session.

After editing, summarise:

- new S10/S11/S12 sections added

- PRD requirements covered

- trade-offs introduced

- whether docs/TEST_PLAN.md can be updated next

---
